title: PortfolioDetails
description: Map of repo name → per-repo enrichment data produced by fetchPortfolioDetails() in src/report-portfolio.js. This is the shape consumed by computeHealthTier() and the portfolio HTML report. All fields are camelCase (fetchPortfolioDetails internal convention), except open_issues which keeps its snake_case name.

RepoDetails.title: RepoDetails
RepoDetails.description: Enrichment data for a single active, non-fork repository

commits.description: Number of commits in the last 180 days via the commit search API

weekly.description: Owner's weekly commit counts for the last 26 weeks from the participation stats endpoint (owner slice, not all contributors)

license.description: SPDX license identifier, or 'None' when unlicensed

ci.description: Total number of GitHub Actions workflows (total_count from /actions/workflows)

communityHealth.description: Community health percentage from /community/profile; null when unavailable

vulns.description: Dependabot vulnerability summary; null when the token lacks vulnerability_alerts:read

ciPassRate.description: Fraction of the last 100 completed workflow runs that succeeded; null when no runs exist or fetch fails

open_issues.description: True open issue count excluding PRs (fetched via paginate, not open_issues_count)

sbom.description: SBOM dependency summary from /dependency-graph/sbom; null when unavailable

released_at.description: published_at of the most recent release; null when no releases exist

hasIssueTemplate.description: True if any issue template was found (API or .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/ directory fallback)

libyear.description: Dependency freshness score; null when SBOM is absent or libyear computation times out

contributors.description: Count of unique human PR authors; populated later in src/report.js from the contributor funnel analysis, not by fetchPortfolioDetails() itself

codeScanning.description: Code scanning alert summary from /code-scanning/alerts; null when unavailable (403/404)

count.description: Number of open secret scanning alerts

secretScanning.description: Secret scanning alert summary from /secret-scanning/alerts; null when unavailable (403/404)

VulnSummary.title: VulnSummary
VulnSummary.description: Trimmed vulnerability/alert summary with optional severity breakdown

max_severity.description: Highest severity level among open alerts; null when count is 0

SBOMSummary.title: SBOMSummary
SBOMSummary.description: Dependency inventory extracted from the GitHub SBOM endpoint

count.description: Total number of dependency packages (root repo entry excluded)

id.description: SPDXID, purl, or name@version fallback identifier

version.description: Installed version; null when absent from SBOM

purl.description: Package URL (purl) from SBOM externalRefs; null when not present

license.description: SPDX expression from SBOM licenseConcluded / licenseDeclared; null when NOASSERTION or absent

total_libyear.description: Sum of years each dependency lags behind its latest release. Lower is fresher. Thresholds: <5 green, <20 yellow, ≥20 red.
